description_long: This is a cylindrical yellow cup with a sealed lid, featuring Japanese text and a map outline of Hokkaido on both the lid and the body. The cup is made of a lightweight, glossy material, likely plastic or coated paper, and is designed for single-use beverage consumption. The front displays bold red and white text, while the back and sides are densely covered with nutritional and product information in Japanese. A white plastic straw is attached to the side, secured in a clear wrapper. The lid is slightly crimped around the edges, and the overall design is bright and eye-catching, suitable for convenience store or vending machine sales. The object is compact, portable, and intended for on-the-go use.
description: A bright yellow, cylindrical cup with Japanese text, a sealed lid, and an attached straw, designed for single-use beverage consumption.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with bold red and white Japanese text, a map of Hokkaido, and product branding on a yellow background.
description_view_1: This side view displays detailed product and nutritional information in Japanese, densely printed in small text.
description_view_2: The rear view continues the product information and shows the cup's tapering shape, with less prominent branding.
description_view_3: This view highlights the attached white straw in its clear wrapper, affixed vertically to the side of the cup.
attribute_bowl_design: The container is a tall, cylindrical cup made of glossy plastic or coated paper, predominantly yellow with a white rim and a sealed lid. The lid and body feature a map outline of Hokkaido and bold Japanese text in red, white, and blue, with no decorative patterns beyond branding elements. The rim is slightly crimped, and a white straw is attached to the side.
attribute_topping_arrangement: No toppings are visible on or inside the container, as the contents are fully sealed and not displayed. The exterior is smooth and uninterrupted except for the attached straw.
attribute_noodle_visibility: No noodles are visible; the contents are completely concealed by the opaque cup and sealed lid.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth is not visible, as the container is sealed and opaque, preventing any assessment of clarity or contents.
attribute_utensil_presence: A single white plastic straw, wrapped in clear plastic, is attached vertically to the side of the cup. No other utensils are present.
